message:
fix: LimitOperator.nextColumnar early termination + extract rowComparator/groupKey shared helpers

- LimitOperator.nextColumnar() returned null on empty batch instead of continuing (missing early guard + continue)
- Extract rowComparator() in types.ts, dedup 4 identical nulls-last sort comparators
- Reuse groupKey() in WindowOperator partition + DistinctOperator row-based key building
